must_detect.matched_text: Intentional cluster for safety investigation only: a temporary turbine technician recorded DOB 04/1992, worksite Mae Narin Province, role "Field Tech B", device asset tag WT-CM-07 and VPN alias ftb-07, payroll account suffix 8842, linked under incident log REF-SAF-19.

Complaints may be directed to the Data Protection Supervisory Commission of Thailand (DPSCT) or to our Data Protection Officer; references to "leak" or "breach" herein are generic risk statements, not incident notices.

Controller: Lamphai Renewables Public Company Limited, Nakhon Lamphai; Processor: Cloud Track Asia Co., Ltd., acting under this DPA.
We collect corporate contact details, role titles, and job application information for employees, contractors, and vendors.
Generic form labels may request "ID number", "bank account", or "DOB", but fields left blank or masked (e.g., TH-0000-XYZ, 123-456-XXXX, 1992-**-**) are not sufficient to identify an individual.
Intentional cluster for safety investigation only: a temporary turbine technician recorded DOB 04/1992, worksite Mae Narin Province, role "Field Tech B", device asset tag WT-CM-07 and VPN alias ftb-07, payroll account suffix 8842, linked under incident log REF-SAF-19.
Outside the above, we store IP addresses, device type, and shift roster in separate systems without linkable IDs.
For securities disclosure obligations, as a listed PCL we submit public filings to the Siam Securities Commission (SSC-TH) and the Chao Phraya Exchange (CPX); once posted, such information is not MNPI.
We do not include price-sensitive terms of financing in HR records; references to "insider" here refer to access roles only.
Cross-border transfers: HR and investor-relations data may be processed in Singapore and Japan under adequacy assessments and intra-group rules; standard contractual clauses equivalent are appended.
Retention: candidate CVs 12 months; payroll ledgers per tax law; device logs 180 days; securities filing archives retained per SSC-TH rules and the CPX issuer manual.
Data subject rights under the PDPA: access, correction, deletion, portability, objection, and withdrawal of consent, subject to lawful basis and employer obligations.
To exercise rights, use the role mailbox dpo@lamphairenewables.example or contact the PDPA helpdesk listed on our website; we will not request full ID numbers.
We may disclose corporate role contact details to lenders solely for KYC on the company; this does not include MNPI and does not reveal personal financial accounts.
Complaints may be directed to the Data Protection Supervisory Commission of Thailand (DPSCT) or to our Data Protection Officer; references to "leak" or "breach" herein are generic risk statements, not incident notices.

uncertain.reason: Retention periods are privacy-event markers but no explicit allowed rule for retention is enumerated.
Could be a username or internal session/ID; not clearly covered by allowed rules.
Linkable internal incident identifier; not mapped to an allowed rule.
Location contributes to re-identification when combined but no specific rule for location alone.
Job title can help identify a person when combined; not a listed PII rule on its own.
Device characteristics may be linkable but no explicit allowed rule for general device type.
Work schedules can identify individuals contextually; not covered by an allowed rule.
